uiBuilder.label: KPI Metric Card
uiBuilder.description: A KPI tile: title (optional icon box), refresh control, large score, change badge or subtitle, and an optional sub-metrics breakdown. Composes now-card + now-icon.

properties.name: variant
properties.label: Change variant
properties.description: Colour + arrow direction of the change badge.

properties.name: showRefresh
properties.label: Show refresh
properties.description: Show the refresh control (spins while loading).

properties.name: subtitle
properties.label: Subtitle
properties.description: Shown instead of / below the change row when set.

properties.name: showChangeRow
properties.label: Show change row
properties.description: Show the change badge + label row.

properties.name: showArrow
properties.label: Show arrow
properties.description: Show the ↑/↓/– arrow in the change badge.

properties.name: showIcon
properties.label: Show icon box
properties.description: Show the leading icon box before the title.

properties.name: iconContent
properties.label: Icon content
properties.description: Text/glyph shown in the icon box (e.g. $).

properties.name: subMetricsJson
properties.label: Sub-metrics
properties.description: JSON array of { label, value, previousValue } shown as a breakdown row.

actions.name: KPI_CARD_CLICKED
actions.label: KPI card clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the card (ignored while loading).

actions.name: KPI_REFRESH_REQUESTED
actions.label: Refresh requested
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks refresh. Re-bind/refresh the data; updating singleScore/changeValue/changeLabel/variant clears the loading state.

actions.name: KPI_SUBMETRIC_CLICKED
actions.label: Sub-metric clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a sub-metric column.
